scripts.bootstrap: npm --prefix frontend-user ci && npm --prefix frontend-admin ci && npm --prefix backend ci && npm --prefix mock-api ci
scripts.dev:all: concurrently -k -n MOCK,USER,ADMIN -c yellow,cyan,magenta "npm run dev:mock" "npm run dev:user" "npm run dev:admin"
scripts.dev:platform: concurrently -k -n API,USER,ADMIN -c green,cyan,magenta "npm run dev:backend" "npm run dev:user" "npm run dev:admin"
scripts.build:all: npm run build:user && npm run build:admin && npm run build:backend
scripts.lint: npm run lint:mock && npm run lint:user && npm run lint:admin && npm run lint:backend
scripts.typecheck: npm run typecheck:user && npm run typecheck:admin && npm run typecheck:backend
scripts.test: npm run test:architecture && npm run test:mock
scripts.test:architecture: node --test tests/architecture/*.test.mjs && npm --prefix frontend-user run test:architecture && npm --prefix frontend-admin run test:architecture && npm --prefix backend run test:architecture
scripts.test:mock: node tests/test_order_pricing.js && node tests/test_service_request_lifecycle.js && node tests/run_technician_rules.js && node tests/test_enum_contract.js
scripts.security:check: npm run security:scan && node --check scripts/backup-mysql.mjs && node --check scripts/restore-mysql.mjs
scripts.check:all: npm run validate:repo && npm run security:scan && npm run lint && npm run typecheck && npm run test:architecture && npm run build:all
scripts.ci: npm run check:all && npm run test:mock
